established: The domain is declared as a translation/readout and does not add a new root.
Meaning attaches only after a domain translation and readout.
Experience, memory, knowledge, view, identity, and conventional truth are typed as distinct objects.
Local/global knowledge scope and cross-domain transport defects are explicit.
The optional informational-LoRA lane freezes W_0 and trains low-rank adapters under a Maker–Checker firewall.
Informational work, semantic potential, barrier crossing, unbinding, rebinding, reconsolidation, and consolidation are specified as domain functionals.
Positive, negative, and abstention controls are executable at the structural-fixture tier.
The bundle checker can pass and fail on machine-derived controls.
not_established: An exact q_MEMK for real human cognition.
Empirical state sufficiency for persons, communities, or institutions.
Literal biological LoRA or low-rank meaning mechanisms.
Informational work as joules or physical energy.
Shock intensity, subjective certainty, awakening, or life change as proof of truth.
Neuroscience, psychology, sociology, religious doctrine, or metaphysics derived from the root.
Cross-domain transport without declared bridge defects.
Clinical efficacy or a treatment protocol.
Predictive validity on independently held-out human data.
